repository.name: Chief-Exexutive-Agent
repository.description: A self-improving AI operator that runs locally, does real tasks on your computer, and calls in the big models only when it needs help.

commit.message:
fix: address review comments

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add ancestor walk tool discovery for subdirectory layouts

Tools are now discovered by walking up from the runbook directory,
probing tools/<name>.tool.yaml at each ancestor level up to the
project root. This enables subdirectory-based examples like
windows-diagnostic/ where tools/ and runbooks/ are siblings.

Zero configuration required. Existing resolution paths checked first.
7 unit tests cover sibling, grandparent, boundary, and backward-compat.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: gert
repository.description: Governed Executable Runbook Tool  domain-agnostic incident response orchestrator

commit.message:
fix: address review comments

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: deduplicate LRU eviction logic into shared lru_insert helper

Extract the repeated OrderedDict LRU eviction pattern from parser.py
and vscode_parser.py into a generic lru_insert() helper in _fs_utils.py.

- Add lru_insert[K, V]() to _fs_utils.py with LRU eviction semantics
- Refactor _insert_events_entry in parser.py to delegate to lru_insert
- Refactor _get_cached_vscode_requests in vscode_parser.py to delegate
  to lru_insert
- Introduce _CachedVSCodeLog frozen dataclass to replace raw tuple in
  _VSCODE_LOG_CACHE (matches _CachedEvents pattern in parser.py)
- Add unit tests for lru_insert covering empty cache, eviction when
  full, stale replacement, and max_size=1

Closes #777

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Feat/system file watcher (#3)

* feat: add system file watcher

* ci: add clippy

* ai: Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update About page with real company bio and team info

- Replace placeholder 'Our Story' text with Kevin's actual company bio
- Add real founder info (Kevin Hyatt) with bio from orthopedic ops background
- Highlight SetTrax/Casechek training, TSA verification, secure facility access
- Add 'In the Field' photo gallery section (using existing images as placeholders)
- Add TODO markers for Kevin's incoming action shots and customer photos
- Remove fabricated stats placeholders ([500+], [99.8%], [50+])
- Add styled mission quote callout block
- Update content.md reference doc to match

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: address review comments

- Update render_cost_view docstring to reflect has_active_period_stats guard
- Correct test docstring to describe actual invariant (no double-counting)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: address review comments

- Add docstring comment for the updated guard condition in render_cost_view
- Rename test_resumed_session_active_zero_cost_falls_back to reflect new behavior
- Add Issue #703 section header before TestHistoricalSessionTableShutdownOnlyCounts

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: suppress 'Since last shutdown' row when has_active_period_stats is False (#775)

When is_active=True and has_shutdown_metrics=True but
has_active_period_stats=False, the '↳ Since last shutdown' row in
render_cost_view was falling back to session totals — misleadingly
attributing the entire session's call count to the post-shutdown period.

Add has_active_period_stats(s) guard to the row's condition so it only
appears when there is meaningful active-period data. Update the existing
regression test (issue #132) and add two new tests covering this edge
case.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: minor improvements v0.6.0 — food in form, EditForm, auto-fill, QR download (#56)

* Fix production startup deploy

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: seed game data + preserve guardian fields between attendees

- Seed "30. Ovčina Balinova pozvánka" game on startup
- After adding an attendee, keep guardian name, relationship, and
  consent pre-filled for the next one (saves parents re-typing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: inject OAuth secrets into Azure Container Apps deployment

Add ExternalAuth secrets (Microsoft, Google, Seznam) to the CI/CD
pipeline so they reach the running container. Client secrets use
Azure Container Apps secretref for encryption at rest.

Also add Google and Microsoft as recipients in privacy policy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: seed admin roles in all environments + version footer v0.5.0

Move production admin seeding before SeedDemoUsers guard.
Add version 0.5.0 to csproj and footer for deploy verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

CI health check failed because Azure returns RunningAtMaxScale instead
of Running. Use prefix match. Also add v0.5.0 version display in footer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add missing System.Reflection using for version display

* fix: use explicit Razor expression for version display

* feat: add game edit functionality on admin Games page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: synced query param as int? not bool (crashes on ?synced=1)

* feat: add GroupName (Název skupiny) field to registration submission

New field on RegistrationSubmission for family/group name.
Shown in editor next to contact name, copied on repeat registration,
displayed in read-only summary. Includes EF migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: show attendee count on dashboard + update subtitle

Dashboard submission cards now show number of registered attendees.
Updated header subtitle to reflect current app scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: hide kingdom dropdown for adult attendees

Kingdom preference is only relevant for players. Hidden for adults
to avoid confusion and potential binding issues with disabled selects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: bump version to 0.5.1

* fix: remove hardcoded credentials from DesignTimeDbContextFactory

Read connection string from appsettings instead of hardcoding.
Resolves GitGuardian generic password alert.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: meal option edit checkbox binding causing 404

The [FromForm] bool isActive parameter fails when the form sends
both hidden 'false' and checkbox 'true' values. Read from
Request.Form directly instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: auto-recover from migration history mismatch

When MigrateAsync fails because tables already exist (42P07),
drop and recreate the database to sync migration history.
Prevents the recurring "AspNetRoles already exists" crash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: hide kingdom dropdown dynamically when Adult is selected

* fix: hide character name and guardian section for adult attendees

* fix: remove hidden inputs for adult role checkboxes (caused false override)

* fix: preserve guardian data when editing minor attendee (closes #53)

Add GuardianName and GuardianRelationship to AttendeeViewModel record
and populate them in the projection. Map both fields (plus the existing
GuardianAuthorizationConfirmed) in StartEditing so the form is
pre-filled when editing a minor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: include food order prices in payment total (closes #49)

CalculateExpectedTotal now sums FoodOrder.Price for each active
registration in addition to the base attendee price.  All callers
(GetSubmission, Submit, Add/Update/RemoveAttendee) now include
FoodOrders in the EF query so the navigation is populated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add QR code download button (closes #50)

Add a "Stáhnout QR kód" link below the payment QR that serves the SVG
as a downloadable file via a base64 data URL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: move food selection into attendee form with lodging column (closes #54)

Move per-attendee meal selection from the separate "Stravování" section
into the attendee add/edit form.  Food and lodging are now shown in a
two-column row (food left, lodging right) when meal options exist.

MealSelections dictionary added to AttendeeInput; AddAttendeeAsync and
UpdateAttendeeAsync now persist FoodOrders via SaveFoodOrdersFromInput.
StartEditing populates MealSelections from ExistingFoodOrders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: convert contact form to Blazor EditForm to preserve data on errors (closes #51)

Replace the PRG-pattern <form method="post"> with a Blazor <EditForm>
using OnValidSubmit.  Inputs are now <InputText>/<InputTextArea> with
@bind-Value so data is never lost on validation errors.

DataAnnotationsValidator + per-field ValidationMessage provide inline
feedback.  SaveContactAsync calls the service directly and shows a
success/error banner without a full-page redirect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-fill attendee data from existing person when name matches

When a registrant fills in first name and surname, the system checks if
a person with the same name already exists. If found, it shows their
details (birth year, last kingdom) and offers to pre-fill the form with
their previous registration data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: E2E test stability + version bump to 0.6.0

- Fix FillAndCommitAsync to dispatch change event for Blazor binding
- Fill GroupName field in E2E smoke test
- Remove duplicate old-style group name input from contact form
- Make submission assert resilient to test ordering
- Flexible pricing assertion (food orders included)
- Bump version to 0.6.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: add integration tests for non-integer outputTokens in build_session_summary (#774)

Add TestSafeIntTokensIntegration class with 4 integration tests that
exercise the full parse_events → build_session_summary pipeline with
malformed outputTokens values (float, null) in both active sessions and
post-shutdown resume scans.

Tests added:
- test_float_output_tokens_ignored_active_session
- test_null_output_tokens_ignored_active_session
- test_float_output_tokens_ignored_post_shutdown
- test_mixed_valid_float_null_tokens

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: address review comments

- Break early when include_plan=False once events.jsonl is found
- Rename test_100_sessions_correct_tuples to test_120_sessions_correct_tuples

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add frontend test suite with Codacy coverage reporting (#153)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: darthjee <3843066+darthjee@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: replace dict scan with linear scan in _discover_with_identity (#773)

Replace the per-session-directory dict comprehension with a two-variable
linear scan that breaks early once both events.jsonl and plan.md are
found. This eliminates O(512) dict allocations and hash-insert operations
on the hot get_all_sessions path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: address review comments

Update docstrings to accurately reflect behavior after
TOOL_EXECUTION_COMPLETE short-circuit optimization:

- test_first_pass_10k_events_prefilter_consulted: clarify frozenset is
  consulted once per *non-tool* event, not every event
- test_1000_tool_events_resolves_model_at_index_3: remove false claim
  about frozenset bypass verification (covered by separate test)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: short-circuit TOOL_EXECUTION_COMPLETE in _first_pass (#772)

Move TOOL_EXECUTION_COMPLETE handling before the frozenset pre-filter in
_first_pass so that, once tool_model is resolved, each subsequent tool
event costs only one string comparison + one None-check + continue
instead of traversing the full five-branch elif chain.

For a 400-tool agentic session this eliminates ~2400 unnecessary string
comparisons per _first_pass call.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: automate fragment IDL attributes (#24)

* refactor: automate fragment IDL attributes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: drop constructor accessor fallback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: CI uses Makefile targets instead of duplicating commands (#437)

- Add 'make ci' target: runs lint, typecheck, security, test with
  verbose output and --cov-report=xml for diff-cover
- Add 'test-ci' target: unit tests with XML coverage + e2e tests
- Replace 6 individual uv run steps in ci.yml with 'make ci'
- diff-cover stays as a separate CI-only step

Single source of truth: Makefile defines what 'all checks pass' means.

Closes #437

fix: align setup-uv to v7 and use plain uv sync to match CI

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: install uv+deps in agent sandbox, use make commands (#747)

- copilot-setup-steps.yml: add setup-uv and uv sync --group dev
- issue-implementer: replace hardcoded uv run chain with make fix && make check
- review-responder: same
- ci-fixer: same

Agents can now run the full CI suite locally. Using Makefile targets
ensures agents stay in sync with CI as commands evolve.

Closes #747

fix: rename _safe_file_identity to public, add __all__ to _fs_utils, move setup_logging import (#765)

- Rename _safe_file_identity → safe_file_identity in _fs_utils.py
  and update all importers (parser.py, vscode_parser.py, tests)
- Drop pyright: ignore[reportPrivateUsage] suppression comments
- Add __all__: Final[list[str]] to _fs_utils.py for consistency
- Add copilot_usage._fs_utils to _PUBLIC_MODULES in test_packaging.py
- Move setup_logging import from deferred local to module-level in cli.py

commit.message:
Fix: 'Mantenere in contatto' now sets status to 'Mantenimento rapporto' and clears follow-up

- enableKeepInTouch: sets status to 'Mantenimento rapporto', clears next_action_at/note
- followUpSummary: excludes contacts with 'Mantenimento rapporto' status
- Fixed Joshua Iannello and Matteo Paba in DB

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix all CRM logic bugs found in audit

CRITICAL fixes:
- gmail/sync: was writing invalid status 'In attesa di risposta' → now 'In attesa'
- postmark/inbound: extract real RFC Message-ID from Headers (was using Postmark UUID)
- postmark/inbound: add in_reply_to and references for proper threading

HIGH fixes:
- gmail/sync: outbound emails now get 'email_sent' notification (was 'email_received')
- reminders/run: notifications now include email_id for both follow-up and mantenimento
- contacts/route: 'Mantenimento rapporto' excluded from status override to 'In attesa'

MEDIUM fixes:
- send + reminders: from_name set to 'Pietro Montanti' (was null)
- followUp.ts: removed unused parameter from buildAutomaticFollowUpNote

LOW cleanup:
- Removed dead 'Da contattare' status checks
- Removed unreachable return in sync route
- Removed unused StrippedTextReply type
- Removed dead 'In attesa di risposta' check in handleContactInbound
- Removed unused DEFAULT_FIRST_FOLLOW_UP_DAYS constant

repository.name: Claude-Code-Agent-Monitor
repository.description: A real-time monitoring dashboard for Claude Code agents, built with SQLite3, Node.js, Express, React, Vite, TailwindCSS, and WebSockets. It tracks sessions, agent activity, tool usage, and subagent orchestration through Claude Code hooks, providing live analytics, a Kanban status board, status notifications, and an interactive web interface.

commit.message:
fix: pulse verde teal per Mantenimento rapporto, sincronizzato con auto-follow

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(parser): replace glob with os.scandir to eliminate O(N) failing stat() calls for absent plan.md

Replace root.glob('*/events.jsonl') in _discover_with_identity with a
two-level os.scandir walk.  Existence of plan.md is now determined by
a dict lookup on the directory listing instead of a stat() syscall that
raises OSError for absent files.

For N=200 sessions where ~90% lack plan.md, this eliminates ~180 failed
stats and 180 OSError instances per get_all_sessions() invocation.

Closes #763

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: pulse su 'Mantenimento rapporto' + migra vecchio status 'Rimanere in contatto'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix period stats tests by time-traveling to a fixed Q1 date

Tests hardcoded specific intermediate quarter/month labels that only
matched when running in Q1 (Jan-Mar). Instead of computing expected
periods dynamically, freeze time to Jan 15, 2024 in the before block
so channel, users, and sups are all created at a fixed Q1 date. This
makes Time.now predictable during test evaluation and keeps expected
output as simple hardcoded strings.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: add config-staleness priority over plan-update tests (#762)

Add two tests to TestActiveSessionCaching:

- test_config_staleness_takes_priority_over_plan_update: verifies that
  when both plan.md and config model change simultaneously, config
  staleness triggers a full re-parse instead of the plan-only fast path.

- test_plan_update_when_config_unchanged_preserves_depends_on_config:
  verifies that the plan-only fast path preserves depends_on_config and
  config_model in the cache entry, preventing silent regression where
  config tracking is lost after a plan rename.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
